Create a spatial (multi-patch) model via stratification

Source: R/stockflow.R
sf_spatial.Rd

Convenience wrapper around sf_stratify for spatial models. Each patch runs independent disease dynamics, with optional migration between patches and optional cross-patch transmission via a contact matrix.

Usage

sf_spatial(
  base,
  patch_names,
  flow_types = NULL,
  migration = list(),
  contact = NULL
)

Arguments

base

A StockFlowModel (the within-patch disease model)

patch_names

Character vector of patch names

flow_types

Named character: base flow name -> type (default all "disease")

migration

Named list of migration specs. Names are migration flow names. Each entry is a list with:

  • from, to: patch names

  • rate: quoted R expression (use the source patch name as the stock variable, e.g., quote(m * patch1))

  • params: character vector of parameter names used in rate

contact

Optional string: contact matrix parameter prefix. When provided, transmission between patches uses a contact matrix (frequency-dependent). Contact parameters are named <prefix>_<to>_<from>.

Value

A stratified StockFlowModel with spatial structure

On this page
